commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an optional `onStartError` reporter plus a default `console.warn` boundary reporter for timer-fired progress-draft gate startup failures, with SDK and compositor regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +33. Total +44 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main and `v2026.6.6` both schedule the delayed start with an empty `catch`, and the compositor supplies no reporter. I did not run tests because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the SDK surface and normal required-check completion.

target.title: fix(channels): default boundary logger for swallowed progress-draft start errors
target.body:
## Summary

Replacement for #92031. Timer-fired progress-draft start failures were silently swallowed because the timer has no awaiting caller and no production caller supplied `onStartError`.

`createChannelProgressDraftGate` now reports timer-path startup failures at the shared helper boundary. Callers can provide `onStartError`; otherwise the gate emits a lightweight warning without widening the public plugin-SDK import graph. Explicitly awaited starts still reject to their caller, and failed timer starts remain retryable.

- Shared surface: `src/channels/streaming.ts`
- Production callers covered: shared compositor, Slack, Matrix, and Microsoft Teams
- Public SDK change: optional callback only; existing callers remain source-compatible
- No `CHANGELOG.md` edit: release generation owns the changelog

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugin-sdk/channel-streaming.test.ts src/channels/progress-draft-compositor.test.ts` => 39 passed across 2 shards
- `pnpm oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/channels/streaming.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-streaming.test.ts src/channels/progress-draft-compositor.test.ts` => clean
- `pnpm tsgo:core` => clean
- `pnpm tsgo:core:test` => clean
- `pnpm test:extensions:package-boundary:compile` => 114 plugins compiled
- `pnpm build` => clean, including plugin-SDK declarations and export checks
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --stream-engine-output` => clean after accepting one P2 about raw error-object logging
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main --stream-engine-output` => clean, no actionable findings

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: timer-fired progress-draft startup rejections are observable instead of silently disappearing.

Real environment tested: macOS 26.5, Node v26.3.0, rebased OpenClaw source checkout.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugin-sdk/channel-streaming.test.ts src/channels/progress-draft-compositor.test.ts`

Evidence after fix: the SDK test drives a delayed rejected start, confirms the supplied reporter receives the original error, then confirms a later work event retries successfully. The compositor integration drives the real shared compositor with no reporter override, fires the delayed timer, and confirms the default boundary warning is emitted.

Observed result after fix: the failure is reported once, the gate is not marked started, and the next work event can retry startup.

What was not tested: live Slack, Matrix, or Microsoft Teams delivery; remote Linux proof. The changed behavior is the shared gate's local error-observation path, not a transport API call.

Refs: #92031.
target.author: hansraj316
